title: Per-ticket Outcome rubric (V8.7)
description: Machine-checkable success criteria attached to a ticket. Clara grades the implementation against this rubric and auto-iterates with Jack up to max_iterations before passing to Cody. Replaces the previous 'looks fine to me' review surface.

must_have.description: Statements that MUST be true for the PR to pass. Each is independently graded by Clara.

scope_paths.description: Glob list of files this ticket is allowed to modify. Enforced via must_not by default.

rubric_score_min.description: Minimum weighted score (0.0–1.0) Clara requires to mark this rubric satisfied. Default 0.85.

escalation_on_persistent_fail.description: Agent canonical_id to escalate to after iterations exhausted. Default: cody-code-escalation-reviewer.
